g.text:
Write to CSS file
Replace style blocks with link
Scan HTML for existing linked local CSS files
Scan CSS for url(data:...) base64 assets
Extract data URLs to a separate custom properties vars file
Rewrite original CSS to use var(--...)
Inject @import of vars file into original CSS
Extract data:image and data:font to real files in assets/
Update vars file to use url('assets/...')
Scan HTML for remaining data: image/font assets
Write assets to assets/ folder and rewrite HTML href/src tags
